name: Zhejiang Yangfan New Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Yangfan New Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of UV curing products, and sulfur-containing fine chemicals and related new materials worldwide. It offers thiophenol, phenyl sulfide, thioanisole, thiofuran, pyridine and aniline, sulfone and sulfoxide, and other intermediates; and photoinitiators. Zhejiang Yangfan New Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Shangyu, China.
